data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by limiting the number of choices on each screen.
data.technical_spec: Clean UI with focused user flows and minimized on-screen elements.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes button size and placement for easier navigation.
data.technical_spec: Large tappable areas for continuous interaction, especially on mobile.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Utilizes proximity and similarity to organize content visually.
data.technical_spec: Consistent visual elements like spacing, alignment, and grouping.

data.title: Doherty Threshold
data.description: Aims to keep user response time under 400ms to maintain engagement.
data.technical_spec: Efficient code to reduce latency and enhance response time.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Focuses on the memorable moments and the final impression of user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Timely notifications and summary insights to enhance user experience.
